title: Bridge Essay: Diffusion property and functional connectivity of superior longitudinal fascicul

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Diffusion property and functional connectivity of superior longitudinal fasciculus underpin human metacognition.**. Neuropsychologia.. PMID: 33812946. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuropsychologia.2021.107847. Metacognition as the capacity of monitoring one'sown cognition operates across domains. Here, we addressed whether metacognition in different cognitive domains rely on common or distinct neural substrates with combined diffusion tensor imaging (DTI) and functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) techniques.
